_meta.label: NEEDS REVIEW - Catalog RFQ with bespoke items not in the SKU catalog; all lines unmatched
_meta.test_focus: no_catalog_match on all lines: bespoke stainless brackets, non-standard thread

inbound_message.subject: RFQ - Bespoke Structural Brackets
inbound_message.body:
Hi,

We require quotes for two bespoke items for a structural project:

- 150x Stainless A4 Bracket, 200x80mm, 6mm plate, non-standard M14 fixing holes
- 150x Stainless A4 Gusset Plate, 120x60mm, 5mm plate, M14 clearance

Delivery needed by 10 August 2025 to our Leeds site.

Helen Marsh
Bridgepoint Structural Ltd

line_items.raw_text: Stainless A4 Bracket, 200x80mm, 6mm plate, non-standard M14 fixing holes
Stainless A4 Gusset Plate, 120x60mm, 5mm plate, M14 clearance
